description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean lines, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. A prominent driveway or pathway extends from the main building, suggesting vehicular access and a possible garage area. The landscaping includes a cluster of trees and shrubs near one side of the house, adding greenery and visual interest to the property. The building appears to be a single-story residence with a spacious footprint, likely offering open-plan living spaces inside. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design, featuring a long driveway and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated driveway and the house's rectangular form, with visible windows and greenery at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, flat roof, and the cluster of trees adjacent to the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the house's length, window placement, and the driveway extending alongside the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and no porch, complemented by a long driveway and subtle landscaping.
